persona: Senior UX researcher at a 500-person SaaS, running in-product feedback
prompt_to_designer: Spin up a study triggered from our internal Claude Skill. Embed it in the Intercom 'was this helpful?' widget; if the user taps 'tell us more' switch to realtime voice. This has to be MCP-callable.
expected_outline_topics: what the user expected to happen
opt-in for a longer follow-up call

sample_answers.text: I clicked 'export report' and got a spinner that never resolved.
A CSV in my downloads folder within about 5 seconds.
I copy-pasted rows into Google Sheets one page at a time. Took 20 minutes.
4 out of 5. Not blocking me, but it wastes my afternoon.
Sure, ping me tomorrow, mornings PT are best.

expected_themes: export spinner-of-death is the top pain point
severity clusters at 4/5 — annoying not blocking
high opt-in rate for voice follow-up when trust is present
CSP-safe embed matters more than researchers realize
